hallucination.rationale: Multiple fabricated details: states he was 'a heavy smoker for most of his life' (he smoked ~1 pack/week for 2 years in college), weight listed as '2.6 pounds (1.2 kg)', total cholesterol stated as 252 (actual 222), HDL stated as 49 (actual 44), triglycerides stated as 175 (actual 185), fasting glucose stated as '1.04 mg/dL', claims 'no nocturia' (transcript says occasional nocturia), claims 'no sun damage noted' (transcript says sun damage was noted), and fabricates that patient noticed 'a change in his blood pressure.'
flagged_content: He has been a heavy smoker for most of his life
He has no sun damage noted
he has noticed a change in his blood pressure, which he attributes to his age

instruction_following.rationale: The note ignores key template instructions: social history, family history, and ROS content are dumped into wrong sections repeatedly; the Objective/Physical Examination section is entirely missing; a non-template 'Preventive Care' section is added; and the note devolves into an infinite repetition loop.

completeness.rationale: The entire physical examination is missing, the Objective section is absent, the Plan section is absent, lab results are mostly missing or incorrect, referrals are not documented, counseling on MI/stroke warning signs is missing, follow-up instructions are missing, and many ROS details are omitted or incorrect.
missed_items: Plan section with all 7 assessment items
Lab results (CBC, liver enzymes, kidney function, thyroid, A1C correctly)
Td booster and flu vaccine administration details

template_adherence.rationale: The note is severely malformed: no Objective section, no Physical Examination, no Vital Signs section, no Plan section, content is massively misplaced across sections, and a non-template 'Preventive Care' section is added. The note devolves into an infinite repetition loop.

entity_marking.rationale: No entity marking was attempted anywhere in the note — no {{drug:...}} or {{condition:...}} syntax is present.

duplication.rationale: Extreme duplication throughout: the blood pressure sentence is repeated hundreds of times, social/family history content is duplicated across multiple sections, and preventive care bullets are repeated.
